邢.origin: A town 阝 — used as an old place name and a family name.

邪.origin: Something crooked and not right — it means evil or wicked.

邮.origin: A post town 阝 where letters pass — it means mail or post.

邵.origin: A town 阝 — used mostly as a family name.

郁.origin: Feelings closed up inside — it means gloomy or lush.

郊.origin: A town 阝 at the city's edge — it means suburbs or outskirts.

sentence.en: We are going to the outskirts.

郎.origin: A man from a good 良 town 阝 — it means a young gentleman.

郑.origin: An old state and town 阝 — used as a family name.

郭.origin: The wall around a town 阝 — it means the city's outer edge.

sentence.en: In ancient times there were city walls.

鄂.origin: A town 阝 — the short name for Hubei province.

酉.origin: A picture of a wine jar — it means wine vessel.

sentence.en: It is now the hour of the Rooster.

酊.origin: A wine 酉 word — it means drunk, used in 酩酊.

配.origin: Wine 酉 matched and mixed — it means to pair or blend.

酒.origin: Water 氵 in a wine jar 酉 — it means wine or alcohol.

酣.origin: To enjoy wine 酉 sweetly 甘 — it means happily and deeply.

酥.origin: A food made with grain 禾 — it means crisp or flaky.

酱.origin: A thick paste made by fermenting 酉 — it means sauce.

sentence.en: Put soy sauce in the dish.

酶.origin: A wine 酉 chemistry word — it means enzyme.

sentence.en: There are enzymes in the stomach.

酷.origin: Strong like aged wine 酉 — it means intense, or cool.

酸.origin: Wine 酉 aged too long turns sour — it means sour or acid.

酽.origin: A drink 酉 that is very strong — it means thick or strong.

酿.origin: To ferment wine 酉 slowly — it means to brew.

醇.origin: Wine 酉 worth savoring 享 — it means rich and mellow.

sentence.en: The milk tastes rich and mellow.

醉.origin: When wine 酉 takes over — it means drunk.

醋.origin: Wine 酉 gone old 昔 and sour — it means vinegar.

sentence.en: Add some vinegar to the noodles.

醒.origin: When the wine 酉 wears off — it means to wake up.

sentence.en: I wake up in the morning.

醭.origin: A film that grows on old wine 酉 — it means mold scum.

釉.origin: The shiny coating on pottery — it means glaze.

sentence.en: The bowl has a shiny glaze.

释.origin: To pick apart and make clear — it means to explain.

野.origin: The land 里 outside the village — it means open country.

针.origin: A thin metal 钅 pin — it means needle.

钉.origin: A metal 钅 spike 丁 — it means nail.

sentence.en: There is a nail on the wall.

钙.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means calcium.

钛.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means titanium.

钝.origin: A metal 钅 blade that won't cut — it means blunt or dull.

sentence.en: The knife is a bit blunt.

钞.origin: Metal 钅 money, now paper — it means bank note.

钠.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means sodium.

钡.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means barium.

钢.origin: Strong, hard metal 钅 — it means steel.

sentence.en: The bridge is made of steel.

钨.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means tungsten.

sentence.en: The bulb has a tungsten filament.

钩.origin: A bent metal 钅 hook 勾 — it means hook.

钮.origin: A small metal 钅 knob — it means button.

钳.origin: A metal 钅 tool that grips — it means pliers or tongs.

钵.origin: A metal 钅 or clay bowl — it means a basin or bowl.

sentence.en: There is a bowl on the table.

钹.origin: A round metal 钅 instrument — it means cymbals.

钾.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means potassium.

铀.origin: A metal 钅 element — it means uranium.

铁.origin: A common, strong metal 钅 — it means iron.

sentence.en: The door is made of iron.

铃.origin: A small metal 钅 bell — it means little bell.

铅.origin: A soft, heavy metal 钅 — it means lead.
